sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83746" key="pleuropristh/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλευρο-πριστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83746.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rib-saw, Hermes</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg007.perseus-grc1:38:283" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.283</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
